# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build-and-test
  
variables:
  DOCKER_DRIVER: "overlay" # Set up docker driver. Overrides /etc/docker/daemon.json in case of a non-"native" Docker runtime (like Kubernetes)
                            and can be overridden on job or stage level too using 'variables' block within stages if needed  
  DOCKER_TLS_CERT_REQUESTED: "true" # To ignore certificate verification issues, set this to true. Set as false in case of a self-signed cert from GitLab CI/CD server (Gitlab Runner). Can be overridden on job or stage level too using 'variables' block within stages if needed
  GIT_DEPTH: "1" # Used when fetching git objects, can prevent the full clone of history by keeping only recent commits. Default is whole repository cloned (all) and set as false in case of a non-recursive fetch to avoid deep copy overheads caused on network issues
  PREVIEWLINK: "https://gitlab/projectname" # Set this with your GitLab instance link when you want deploy via previewlink. Can be overridden only job level using 'variables' block within stages if needed  
                                   # Also can override in case of running on server or local docker environment as required by project settings 
    			   		       # (like setting up a specific database) to avoid conflicts and ensure that the correct version is fetched from git. Can be overridden only job level using 'variables' block within stages if needed  				       	        					                  
                           	 	   	     							     								          ​                                                                                                                       ​​                  .    ##This line of code can help to generate release notes in merge requests and notifications when merged into master branch. 		     A tag will be created with the format <MR-TITLE>, followed by date/time (and commit id)
                           	  							          ​                  			         	 									               .    ## End of line to generate release notes in merge requests and notifications when merged into master branch. 		       A tag will be created with the format <MR-TITLE>, followed by date/time (and commit id)
